name: codemasters-project
description: Racine du dépôt : scripts pour lancer backend + frontend ensemble.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
